scene_title: Joao de Patmos com pena e pergaminho
narrative_beat: Profeta anciao em safira dourada contra ilha rocosa

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: colorful vivid apostle John on Patmos as ancient prophet in sapphire blue and gold robes with white hair wide-eyed in vision holding writing quill in vibrant foreground
subject.focal_point: the prophet's wide eyes of vision and his writing quill
subject.secondary: black and white desaturated rocky Mediterranean island with rough sea and ancient ruins in background
props: prophet in sapphire blue and gold robes

symbolism.primary: John the Revelator two thousand years ahead of his time
symbolism.secondary: quill as instrument of prophetic foreknowledge

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
muted desaturated background palette warm saturated foreground only
